systemicIssues.description: Browser automation tool (agent-browser) cannot launch due to missing libatk-1.0.so.0 shared library (ATK accessibility toolkit) and related GTK libraries.
systemicIssues.error: /home/riz/.cache/ms-playwright/chromium_headless_shell-1208/chrome-headless-shell-linux64/chrome-headless-shell: error while loading shared libraries: libatk-1.0.so.0: cannot open shared object file: No such file or directory
resolutionAttempted: Round 1: agent-browser install, agent-browser install --with-deps, npx playwright install-deps chromium - all failed due to sudo requirement
Round 2: agent-browser install (succeeded for Chromium binary), agent-browser install --with-deps (failed - sudo requires password), attempted browser launch (failed - libatk-1.0.so.0 missing)
systemicIssues.blocker: System-level GTK libraries (libatk1.0-0, libatk-bridge2.0-0, libatspi2.0-0) cannot be installed without root/sudo access. This is a persistent infrastructure blocker.
systemicIssues.persistence: Issue persisted across Round 1 and Round 2. Requires system administrator intervention to install: libatk1.0-0 libatk-bridge2.0-0 libatspi2.0-0 libgdk-pixbuf2.0-0

features: Displays list with Peserta, Template, Skor, Status columns
Status badges (Belum Dimulai, Sedang Dikerjakan, Sudah Disubmit, Sudah Direview)
Form validation (Peserta wajib dipilih, Template pertanyaan wajib dipilih)
indonesianLabels: Pilih peserta dan template pertanyaan untuk memulai penilaian

features: Question type rendering: single_choice (radio), multiple_choice (checkbox), short_text (input), long_text (textarea), rating (1-5 buttons), boolean (Ya/Tidak), date (date picker)
indonesianLabels: Jawab semua pertanyaan dengan jujur dan akurat

features: Objective score calculation based on is_correct flag
Assessment results display with per-question breakdown
Score summary cards (Total Skor, Skor Objektif, Skor Esai)

appliedUpdates.description: Updated Round 2 status - Browser automation still blocked by missing libatk-1.0.so.0. Attempted install succeeded for Chromium binary but system dependencies still require sudo.

recommendation: Persistent browser automation infrastructure blocker. System-level GTK libraries (libatk1.0-0, libatk-bridge2.0-0, libatspi2.0-0) must be installed by system administrator with sudo. Alternatively: 1) Use containerized browser with bundled dependencies, 2) Switch to API-only testing using curl, 3) Manual human verification. Code analysis confirms all features are correctly implemented.
conclusion: Round 2 could not progress past infrastructure setup. All 6 assertions remain blocked. No flow validators were spawned.
